title: How to make an access to information or privacy request – Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## How to make an Access to Information or Privacy request
To make an Access to Information or Privacy request for information held by the Health Canada, you may complete the Access to Information or Privacy Request Form or send a letter mentioning the Act and describing the information you are seeking to the ATIP Office. Please include any relevant details to help the ATIP Office locate the information.

## What you will need to submit a request
Using the ATIP Online Request service is a convenient way to get requests submitted more quickly and easily, while simplifying the application process.
Apply online today to save time and postage.
Written requests may be submitted via:
- Treasury Board Secretariat's Access to Information Request Form (TBC/CTC 350-57) ;
- Treasury Board Secretariat's Personal Information Request Form (TBC/CTC 350-58) ;
- A signed and dated letter indicating that the request is made in accordance with the Act and describing the information you are seeking. Please send your request to Access to Information and Privacy Division Holland Cross, Tower B 7th Floor, Suite 700, Room 741 1600 Scott Street, Address locator: 3107A Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9
Please send your request to

### 2. Proof that you have the right to make a request:
Access to Information Request
- To be eligible, you must be a Canadian citizen, a permanent resident of Canada or an individual or corporation currently present in Canada.
Personal information requests
- Everyone has the right to access their personal information held by government institutions that are subject to the Privacy Act .
- There is a $5.00 application fee for requests made under the Access to Information Act .
- Payment can be made by: Credit card (Visa, MasterCard or American Express) using the ATIP Online Request 's payment service; or Cheque or money order made payable to the Receiver General for Canada when applying by mail.
- Credit card (Visa, MasterCard or American Express) using the ATIP Online Request 's payment service; or
- Cheque or money order made payable to the Receiver General for Canada when applying by mail.

## For more information please contact us at:
Access to Information and Privacy Division Holland Cross, Tower B 7 th Floor, Suite 700, Room 741 1600 Scott Street, Address locator: 3107A Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9 Telephone: 613-954-9165
Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)
Email: atip-aiprp@hc-sc.gc.ca
